case_title: ADMIRAL INSURANCE COMPANY VS. P & J UTILITY COMPANY ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ADMIRAL INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT P & J UTILITY COMPANY A CORPORATION DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-07-2020
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100090579) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100088053), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ADMIRAL INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED OCT-08-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE OCT-08-2019 AS TO DEFENDANT P & J UTILITY COMPANY A CORPORATION

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $415.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100090579) AS TO DEFENDANT P & J UTILITY COMPANY A CORPORATION
DECLARATION OF RODOLFO GABA, JR., IN SUPPORT OF CALCULATION OF ACCRUED INTEREST (TRANSACTION ID # 100090579) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ADMIRAL INSURANCE COMPANY
DECLARATION -1033 (TRANSACTION ID # 100090579) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ADMIRAL INSURANCE COMPANY
DECLARATION RE UNDERLYING ACTION FOR OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT (TRANSACTION ID # 100090579) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ADMIRAL INSURANCE COMPANY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ADMIRAL INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT P & J UTILITY COMPANY A CORPORATION $7,259.41 PRINCIPAL, $1,516.38 INTEREST, $415.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,190.79, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100090579)
